Title: Authorizes the county of Cortland to transfer ownership of Linear Park to Lime Hollow Nature Center, Inc.
Summary: Authorizes the county of Cortland to transfer ownership of Linear Park to Lime Hollow Nature Center, Inc.; provides that such lands shall revert to the county of Cortland if they cease to be used for the agreed upon purpose; provides that such park shall continue to be made available to the general public of the state of New York.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the county of Cortland to transfer ownership of Linear Park to Lime Hollow Nature Center, Inc.
